summary: Theme CSS variables were updated to make `bg-background` render as a red background in both light and dark modes, and foreground variables were adjusted for readability. However, there are additional unrelated changes (including edits to an immutable-path hook file) and added metadata files that were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified Internet Identity hook implementation/config behavior (unrelated to background color change) in an immutable-path file.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asked for landing page/theming color + readability updates, and explicitly constrained not to edit files under `frontend/immutablePaths` including `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts`.

hallucinated_features.description: Added project-level metadata/state file describing many existing features and monorepo/template setup.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any requirement; BuildRequest scope is only landing page background color and readability adjustments.
